case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JONHZON ALFREDO MARTINEZ CHIMILIO

docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: DEFENDANT - JONHZON ALFREDO MARTINEZ CHIMILIO ; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - KNOW KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED AUG-06-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHIMILIO, JONHZON ALFREDO MARTINEZ
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-10-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY JOSEFINA FLORES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JONHZON ALFREDO MARTINEZ CHIMILIO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHIMILIO, JONHZON ALFREDO MARTINEZ $1,857.10 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,957.10 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-03-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-10-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY ALEJANDRA CHANQUIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM ELIZABETH ZAREH; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 09/03/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,857.10 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CHIMILIO, JONHZON ALFREDO MARTINEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-03-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
